bookmarkMarker.title: Bookmark Marker
bookmarkMarker.bookmarkMarkerDescription: Display color markers in the file tree based on document bookmarks
bookmarkMarker.bookmarkFeature1: Display color labels for bookmarked documents in the file tree
bookmarkMarker.bookmarkFeature2: Empty bookmarks will not show markers
bookmarkMarker.bookmarkFeature3: Customizable bookmark names and corresponding colors
bookmarkMarker.bookmarkNamePlaceholder: Enter bookmark name, press Enter to add
